summary: All features verified working: VendorOps 4-tab layout with Orders/Fulfillment tab, Affiliates 3-tab layout with Performance/Withdrawals tabs and aligned form fields, Group Deals 5-step wizard, Bulk CSV import for catalog items. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.

issues: Route is /admin/catalog not /admin/catalog-workspace - sidebar link may need update

critical_code_review_comments: VendorOpsPage.jsx: OrdersFulfillmentTab properly implements status update dropdown with fulfillment_locked check
AffiliatesPage.jsx: Form fields aligned with public application (first_name, last_name, primary_platform, social links, audience_size, promotion_strategy)
GroupDealsAdminPage.jsx: 5-step wizard with wizardStep state (1-5) and step indicator bar
catalog_workspace_routes.py: bulk-import endpoint validates required name, detects duplicates by name+category
seed_data_creation: Test affiliates and campaigns created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 323 features verified. VendorOps Orders tab uses GET /api/admin/orders-ops. Affiliates form uses POST /api/admin/affiliates with first_name/last_name fields. Group Deals wizard has 5 steps. Bulk import uses POST /api/admin/catalog-workspace/bulk-import with CSV file.

vendor_ops_4_tabs.details: Pricing Requests, Orders/Fulfillment, Vendors, Products tabs all present and functional

vendor_ops_orders_tab.details: Orders table shows order_number, customer, source, total, payment status, status dropdown. Status update dropdown disabled when fulfillment_locked

affiliates_3_tabs.details: Affiliates, Performance, Withdrawals tabs all present and functional

affiliates_form_fields.details: Form has first_name, last_name, email, phone, location, primary_platform, social links (instagram, tiktok, facebook, website), audience_size, promotion_strategy

affiliates_performance_tab.details: Shows total sales, commission earned, pending, paid, conversions, last activity, status columns

group_deals_5_step_wizard.details: Step indicator bar shows 5 steps. Step 1: Product Selection, Step 2: Pricing, Step 3: Target, Step 4: Promotion, Step 5: Review

bulk_import_endpoint.details: POST /api/admin/catalog-workspace/bulk-import accepts CSV, validates required name, detects duplicates, returns imported/skipped counts

bulk_import_ui.details: Catalog Workspace page shows Bulk Import section with Download Template and Upload CSV buttons
